status:
This is Croatia’s goal against Brazil almost at the dead end of the extra time, came from nowhere and a deflected shot off a Brazil’s player. Croatia celebrated as if they won the match; in the end this goal or more specifically this deflection became the most discussed topic of the game despite Neymar scoring a magical goal. 
What a costly deflection it became ultimately! 
Heartbreaking exit of Brazil from this World Cup. The tournament certainly lost a lot of its colours.

এবারের ঈদটা সোস্যাল মিডিয়া, ইমেইল এবং ফোন থেকে দূরে থেকে কাটালাম। বলতে বাধ্য হবো, এই প্রযুক্তিগুলো থেকে দূরে থেকে যথেষ্ট ভালো বোধ করেছি। এভাবে মাঝে মাঝে ডুব দেয়াটা চর্চায় পরিণত করতে হবে ভবিষ্যতে। সোস্যাল মিডিয়ায় নিজেকে সম্পূর্ণ উজাড় করে দিতে গিয়ে বাস্তব জীবন থেকে যে আমরা কখন দূরে সরে যাই, সেটা টেরই পাই না অনেক সময়। এরকম দুয়েকটা ডুব দিলে তবেই সেটা উপলব্ধি করা যায়।

status:
It’s normal that I wouldn’t be able to feel 1% of the pain this father and mother have been enduring. Still that small less than 1% of their pain seems to me unthinkably unbearable. I couldn’t breathe while reading their statements.
I hope and pray that their little girl gets well soon and they have the strength to go through this extremely difficult time.

status:
This is official now. Last Thursday (25 July 2019) was the hottest day in the recorded history of the United Kingdom when 38.7 C was measured at the Cambridge University Botanic Garden. The same day, Belgium, Luxembourg, Germany and the Netherlands in continental Europe experienced their record-breaking heatwave while France experienced over 40 C although it wasn't a new record for them.
